evidence: "Hands down one of the funniest old school movies I have seen in a good long while."
"The dialogue was good yet in places felt forced."
"An thrill ride from beginning to end."
"Perfect pacing, I loved the use of the black and the white; it made it feel more intimate."
"Solid writing, amazing acting, cinematography and music."
"Usually I love his movies but this one felt like a three hours of hoping something great would come of all the incredible dialogue."
"The music was good. The cast was brilliant."
"Wow one word 'speechless', loved season one and season two was even more incredible."

summary: The user has a strong preference for thrillers and comedies, appreciating high-quality production and fast pacing. They value emotional resonance in their viewing experiences, often recommending shows and movies that evoke strong feelings.
